# Per host exec count (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Per host exec count.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and agent_hostname != null | comp count() as execs by agent_hostname | sort desc execs | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
